company.name: MCTV Elite Advertising
company.tagline: North Mississippi's Indoor Digital Billboard Network

booking.label: Book a 15-Minute Discovery Call
booking.subtitle: Pick a time that works for you. We'll walk through the package, answer questions, and get the paperwork moving.

sponsorship_packages.name: Ole Miss Football Season Sponsorship
sponsorship_packages.tagline: Own the Square through gameday season
sponsorship_packages.description: Lock in premium screen rotation across every Oxford venue from late August through bowl season. 4 months of saturation around Ole Miss home games, tailgates, and watch parties.

sponsorship_packages.name: Mississippi State Bulldog Season Sponsorship
sponsorship_packages.tagline: Hail State — own the Golden Triangle this fall
sponsorship_packages.description: Saturation across all 30 Starkville venues from September through bowl season. Ride the football and basketball tailgate energy from Cotton District to The Junction.

sponsorship_packages.name: Double Decker Festival Blitz
sponsorship_packages.tagline: Be the brand on the Square Double Decker weekend
sponsorship_packages.description: Premium 30-day saturation across Oxford venues built around Double Decker (late April). Captures festival-goers, art collectors, and out-of-town visitors filling the Square.

sponsorship_packages.name: Graduation & Move-Out Season
sponsorship_packages.tagline: Catch parents, grads, and move-out spend
sponsorship_packages.description: May saturation across Oxford and Starkville college venues. Hits parents in town for graduation, students prepping move-out, and the rush of summer-season decisions.

sponsorship_packages.name: Holiday Shopping Sponsorship
sponsorship_packages.tagline: Own the network from Black Friday through New Year
sponsorship_packages.description: Network-wide saturation across Oxford, Starkville, and Tupelo from mid-November through year-end. Built for retailers, restaurants, and gift-card-driven brands chasing holiday spend.

sponsorship_packages.name: Tupelo Summer Sponsorship
sponsorship_packages.tagline: Own North Mississippi's biggest summer city
sponsorship_packages.description: Tupelo network saturation June through August. Built around concerts at Cadence Bank Arena, family travel, and the Elvis Festival weekend.

network.description: MCTV Elite Advertising operates the largest indoor digital billboard network in North Mississippi, placing your brand directly in front of captive audiences in restaurants, gyms, offices, barbershops, salons, medical offices, and retail locations.

Oxford.description: Oxford is the heart of the MCTV network. 75 screens blanket the city from the Square to University Avenue to Highway 6.

Starkville.description: 30 screens across Starkville reach Mississippi State students, staff, and families throughout the Golden Triangle region.

Tupelo.description: 25 screens in Tupelo bring your brand to the largest city in Northeast Mississippi.

Columbus.description: MCTV is expanding into Columbus with initial screen placements at key venues.

West Point.description: MCTV is growing into West Point with initial screen placements.

contract_terms.prepay_6mo_bonus: Pay 6 months upfront, get a 7th month FREE
contract_terms.prepay_12mo_bonus: Pay 12 months upfront, get the 13th & 14th months FREE

social_proof.headline: Trusted by Local Businesses Across North Mississippi
trust_points: Every piece of content we create belongs to the advertiser
Quarterly content refreshes at no extra charge
Ads cannot be skipped, blocked, or scrolled past
Real-time analytics powered by NTV360 dashboard

proposal_settings.tone: Professional but warm. Mississippi local business feel. Confident without being pushy. Emphasize partnership over salesmanship.

creatomate.instructions: To set up: 1) Design a 1920x1080 template in Creatomate editor. 2) Name text elements to match element_map keys. 3) Copy the template ID and paste it above.
